data.description: As a cleric who has chosen the Knowledge, Life, and Light domains, you can use this ability to censure undead creatures. As an action, present your holy symbol and speak in the name of your deity. Undead within 30 feet of you must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage. For its action, the creature can Dash as far away from you as possible, but it can't move into a space occupied by another creature.
